questions.q:
Match compounds given in $(\mathrm{X})$ with their uses in $(\mathrm{Y})$
\begin{array}{ll}{c}{\mathbf{X}} & {c}{ Y } \\A. \mathrm{Na}_2 \mathrm{CO}_3 & I. Glass \\B. \mathrm{Na}_2 \mathrm{SiO}_3 & II. Bleach \\C. NaOH & III. \mathrm{SO}_2 absorber \\D. NaOCl & IV. Detergent\end{array}
options:
A IV 
B I
C III
D II

A I 
B III
C IV
D II

A II 
B IV
C I
D III

A III 
B II
C IV
D I
